master of computer science

A Master of Science in Computer Science is an advanced academic degree focused on the study of computer systems, programming, software development, algorithms, data structures, and related technologies. It prepares individuals for roles in software development, system analysis, research, and other specialized areas in the technology field.

what is mental health

Mental health refers to a person's emotional, psychological, and social well-being. It affects how individuals think, feel, and behave, as well as how they handle stress, relate to others, and make choices. Good mental health is important for overall well-being and functioning in daily life.
